all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And when he had consulted with the people, he appointed singers unto the Lord, and that should praise the beauty of holiness, as they went out before the army, and to say, Praise the Lord; for his mercy endureth for ever.
2 Chronicles 20:21
Quote of the Day
"Jesus Christ broke the bands of death imposed by the Fall. With His Resurrection, He secured salvation from physical death."
Elder Ronald A. Rasband | 1 Apr 2026General Conference
